title: butterflies
body:
butterfly lyrics

the only habits i have are addictions
the rest are just fiction
the more that i say the less that i listen
the moral the story isn't the point
this joint is a pinion
push a point forth and i'm pinned in
tried to point north now i'm spinning
used to point god now i'm sitting
i hope you don't think i'm conceited
i know time's undefeated
my conceit is
it takes two to play a championship
it takes you to make me feel different
i made life a cocoon you couldn't see me in
but i fly too high to try that anymore
now i make music with these wings and hope you got a dial tone and a dial to tune in to me with when it rings
that's my calling
if you need to break out too i know you can do it
i don't need to push through it
my secretions ain't secret
if you ain't leaking
i don't need to push fluids
my great weakness is seasons
i can't stay when i'm moving somewhere else to keep eating and not freezing
i hope you intuit my meaning and don't wipe out the tracks that i'm leaving to get back to ya
